channel.title: The Doctrine And Covenants
channel.description: A podcast feed generated from an M3U playlist of scripture chapter recordings.
channel.itunes:author: LDS Scripture Audio

item.title: 2015-11-0001-title-female-voice-64k-eng
item.description: Volume: The Doctrine And Covenants • Book: 2015-11-0001-title-female-voice-64k-eng
